# Root README Ownership

`README.pt-BR.md` is the Portuguese front door for the repository.

- Keep the first fold concise, discoverable, and easy to scan.
- Use the README to route readers to deeper docs instead of restating the whole architecture.
- Keep wording aligned with the public docs, starter kit, and templates.

## Follow-Through Triggers

- If the Portuguese README changes structure, claims, or navigation, update the English README and any affected docs links in the same change.
